headline: Level up your cooking with the Guardian Feast app
snippet: The Guardian Feast app is packed full of over 7,000 recipes from our Guardian cooks, including Meera Sodha, Felicity Cloake, Benjamina Ebuehi, Tom Hunt, Rukmini Iyer, Yotam Ottolenghi, Rachel Roddy, a
full_text: The Guardian Feast app is packed full of over 7,000 recipes from our Guardian cooks, including Meera Sodha, Felicity Cloake, Benjamina Ebuehi, Tom Hunt, Rukmini Iyer, Yotam Ottolenghi, Rachel Roddy, and more – so you don’t need to worry about the bulk, or the butter stains. And with smart, exclusive features to hand, you can take the hard work out of discovering new recipes to try – with suggested filters as you search, collections to save your favourite recipes and cook mode to keep the screen live while you’re cooking. Whether you’re looking for inspiration for quick weeknight meals, a last-minute dinner party spread replete with dietary requirements, or a culinary challenge you can sink your teeth into, the Feast app is your ultimate kitchen aide. Oven on pre-heat? Download the Feast app from the App Store or Google Play to start your free trial.
